name: ordinary-claude-skills
description: Aggregated repository of 600+ official and community-built Claude skills organized by category, with a searchable static documentation site. Covers science, software engineering, infrastructure, data/AI, business, creative, and web3 domains.
scan_summary: Aggregated collection of 600+ skills from multiple sources (Anthropic, Composio, k-dense-ai, community). Non-standard license (NOASSERTION). Skills are categorized in skills_all/ and skills_categorized/ directories. Repo author acknowledges passive maintenance and does not individually vet each skill. Contains Python utility scripts for site generation. Static docs site at microck.github.io.

findings_summary.notes: Large aggregation repo with known caveats: (1) Author self-describes it as 'non-curated' and says bugs may go unnoticed; (2) License is NOASSERTION — unclear redistribution rights for the aggregated skills; (3) Skills from various third-party sources with unverified individual quality; (4) 600+ skills makes individual review impractical. Useful as a browsing index but individual skills should be vetted before use in sensitive contexts.
